prompt: How do I find and prepare a speaker for our R-Ladies meetup, and what should I collect from them beforehand?
assertions: Says to look for speakers at least two months ahead
Emphasizes speaker diversity (avoid a year of all-white speakers / all-white panels)
Names places to find diverse speakers (R-Ladies Directory, Community Slack, minority-focused communities)
Says to collect a bio and their pronouns
Says to collect an informative abstract (and their capacity)
Says to test screen-sharing ahead of time for online events
Mentions funding accessible travel/accommodation where applicable
Says to thank the speaker and encourage submitting materials to R Weekly
